128 _39LDD WLK_WC_BOTH_DSCHRG_CD (39Ldd) Locomotion - Walk/wheelchair/both: Discharge CHAR 1 A score indicating the patient's ability to both walk and use a wheelchair at discharge. This item indicates that the patient uses 'both' means of locomotion about equally. B = Both, C = Wheelchair, W = Walk
129 _39LG WLK_WC_GOAL_CD (39Lg)
